Content Types

Grid Rhythm

Photo · Photo · Design tile — repeated across both weeks. Breaks the feed from feeling like a portfolio, earns saves on educational posts, and makes the profile look intentional from first visit.

Full Post Details
Week One — March 5 to 11
7 posts
05
Thursday · March
Brand Intro
Post at 9:00 AM
Lower Mainland, BC
First post. Brand introduction. The grid starts here.
Caption
We're Stonnex Group — a roofing company built on precision, pride, and doing the job right the first time. We operate across the Lower Mainland. Architectural shingle replacements, standing seam metal roofing, skylight installations, and new construction roofing. Whether you need a roof right now or not, we think you'll want to follow along. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC 🌐 stonnex.com
Hashtags
#StonnexGroup #VancouverRoofing #LowerMainlandBC #BCRoofing #LowerMainlandContractor #VancouverContractor #ShingleRoofing #MetalRoofing #NewAccount #RoofingBC
Design & Grid Note This is the anchor for the entire grid. Post the navy logo card as-is — no overlays, no text additions. It should feel like a brand card, not a promotional post. Resist the urge to add anything else.
06
Friday · March
Project Photo
Post at 11:00 AM
Let the aerial shot set the standard. First project post — lead with the strongest visual.
Caption
From above, the geometry tells the whole story. This Lower Mainland residence got a full standing seam metal installation — tight seams, long panels, built for the next 50 years. Metal roofing on the coast makes sense. Handles the rain, handles the wind, handles time. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#StandingSeamMetal #MetalRoofing #LowerMainlandHomes #AerialRoofing #VancouverContractor #BCRoofing #MetalRoof #ModernRoofing #StonnexGroup #LuxuryRoofing
Design & Grid Note Post exactly as shot — no filters, no overlays. The aerial angle and clean geometry contrast perfectly against the navy brand tile. Crop square (1:1) centered on the roofline. If reposting as a Reel, add a slow zoom-in with ambient audio.
07
Saturday · March
Educational
Post at 10:00 AM
Know Your Roof
3 signs your roof needs attention before spring.
①Granules collecting in gutters
②Shingles curling or lifting
③Daylight visible in the attic
— Stonnex Group
Earn the save. Educational content should feel like a service, not a pitch.
Caption
Save this. Share it with a neighbour. BC spring is hard on aging roofs — the freeze-thaw cycle through winter does more damage than most people realize. If any of these apply to your home, DM us. We offer free inspections — no pitch, no pressure. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#RoofInspection #BCHomeowner #SpringRoofCheck #RoofingTips #FreeInspection #LowerMainlandBC #VancouverHomes #RoofMaintenance #HomeownerTips #StonnexGroup
Design & Grid Note Build in Canva: cream background, navy Playfair Display heading, three numbered items in Inter. No logo on the image — Stonnex brand name in small text at the bottom only. White space is intentional. This post earns saves which signals quality content to the algorithm.
08
Sunday · March
Statement Photo
Post at 5:30 PM
Minimal caption. Maximum visual impact. Sunday is scroll time — let the image lead.
Caption
Golden hour from a Burnaby rooftop. Another installation done. Another home covered for the next 30 years. There's something about this job — you see the city from angles most people never do. 📍 Burnaby, BC
Hashtags
#BurnabyRoofing #VancouverSkyline #GoldenHour #StonnexGroup #RoofingLife #BurnabyBC #LowerMainlandBC #Sunset #RoofsOfVancouver #ViewFromTheTop
Design & Grid Note Post with zero edits — no filters, no overlays. The warm amber tones anchor the second row of the grid with energy. If posting as a Reel, fade in from black with a single ambient track. Post at 5:30 PM — golden hour timing on a Sunday is peak scroll.
09
Monday · March
Detail Shot
Post at 12:00 PM
The ridge line is where craftsmanship shows. Detail shots earn respect from people who know the trade.
Caption
The ridge line is where craftsmanship lives. Every cut. Every overlap. Every seal done by hand. This is a North Shore installation on a clear day — you can see the city from up here. We don't take these views for granted. 📍 North Shore, Vancouver
Hashtags
#RidgeDetail #NorthShoreVancouver #VancouverRoofer #CraftsmanshipMatters #ShingleRoofing #ArchitecturalShingles #RoofingCraft #StonnexGroup #BCRoofing #RoofingVancouver
Design & Grid Note The sun flare is a feature, not a flaw — keep it. Bright blue sky tones balance well in the grid between the golden Sunday post and the teal VELUX post coming next. No crop needed on this one — the vertical composition works in 4:5 ratio.
10
Tuesday · March
Product Feature
Post at 10:00 AM
Skylights are a niche many homeowners want but don't know who to call for. Own it.
Caption
Three VELUX skylights. One Lower Mainland residence. Natural light changes how a home feels — and proper installation is what keeps it dry for decades. We handle the full scope: waterproofing, custom flashing, and seamless integration with the existing roofing system. Thinking about skylights? DM us. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#VELUXSkylight #SkylightInstallation #NaturalLight #RoofingBC #LowerMainlandRoofer #VancouverRoofing #Skylight #HomeUpgrade #SkylightRoof #StonnexGroup
Design & Grid Note The teal-blue glass tones of the VELUX units give this post its own distinct palette in the grid. Post as a carousel by adding the single skylight close-up (7.22.34 PM) as slide 2 — gives followers a scale perspective. No text overlay on the lead image.
11
Wednesday · March
Behind the Scenes
Post at 9:00 AM
Process content earns trust. Show the work, not just the finished result.
Caption
Decking day. Before any shingle goes down, the foundation has to be right. Re-decking is something a lot of contractors skip or patch over. We don't. If the substrate isn't solid, we address it. Then we build the roof. No shortcuts. Just the job done right. 📍 Vancouver, BC
Hashtags
#RoofingProcess #BehindTheScenes #RoofDecking #BCContractor #NoShortcuts #RoofingLife #HowItsBuilt #Craftsmanship #VancouverRoofer #StonnexGroup
Design & Grid Note Warm earthy tones anchor the third row alongside the cream myth tile and natural new construction shot. This photo's authenticity is its strength — slight warmth boost is fine, nothing else. The caption does the work here.
Week Two — March 12 to 18
7 posts
12
Thursday · March
Educational
Post at 10:00 AM
Myth
All shingles are the same.
Fact
Architectural: 25–50 yr lifespan
3-Tab: 15–20 yr lifespan
The cost difference at install is small.
The gap over time is an entire reroof.
— Stonnex Group
Myth-busting content gets shared. It positions Stonnex as the expert without being preachy.
Caption
We always spec architectural shingles for BC homes. The climate here demands it. The price difference between 3-tab and architectural at install is often a few hundred dollars. The difference in what you're replacing in 15 years versus 40 years is a full reroof. Questions about materials? Drop them below or send a DM. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#ArchitecturalShingles #RoofingFacts #BCRoofing #HomeownerTips #KnowYourRoof #ShingleRoofing #RoofingAdvice #LowerMainlandBC #StonnexGroup #RoofingVancouver
Design & Grid Note Build in Canva: soft grey or cream background, MYTH in light grey italic, FACT in bold navy Playfair Display. Same visual system as Post 3 — consistent text tile language across both weeks. No photo. Expect saves and shares more than comments.
13
Friday · March
Project Photo
Post at 11:00 AM
New construction work signals serious capacity. This photo is wide, impressive, and shows scale.
Caption
New build in the Fraser Valley. Called in at the frame stage — the best way to do it. When we're involved early, we can waterproof, wrap, and shingle in the right sequence with no compromises. The result is a roof that performs from day one. This is how a roof should start. 📍 Fraser Valley, BC
Hashtags
#NewConstruction #FraserValleyBC #BuildingBC #TimberFrame #RoofingVancouver #NewBuildRoof #BCConstruction #ShingleRoofing #StonnexGroup #LowerMainlandBuilder
Design & Grid Note Wide crop (16:9 or 4:5) to show the full building footprint. Natural warm tones from the timber frame and overcast sky complement the grid. This is a capacity post — it should communicate that Stonnex handles large-scale new construction, not just reroof jobs.
14
Saturday · March
Premium Statement
Post at 12:00 PM
The most cinematic photo in the set. Post at midday Saturday — peak scroll time. Keep the caption tight.
Caption
Standing seam at dusk. This installation is near the water — built to handle rain, salt air, and everything the BC coast throws at a roof. Metal roofing in the Lower Mainland: 40–70 year lifespan. Minimal maintenance. Handles this climate without question. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#StandingSeamMetal #MetalRoofing #WaterfrontHomes #VancouverRoofing #PremiumRoofing #StonnexGroup #LowerMainlandHomes #MetalRoof #BCRoofing #CoastalHome
Design & Grid Note Post this with zero edits — do not lighten or filter. The dark charcoal dusk tones are the entire aesthetic. This post creates the strongest visual contrast in the grid — dark against the cream values tile that follows. The marina in the background gives it a premium coastal context that nothing else in the set has.
15
Sunday · March
Brand / Values
Post at 10:00 AM
“
Every roof we install is someone's home. Someone's family. We don't forget that.
— Stonnex Group
Sunday post. Let the values land quietly. This is the most human post in the calendar.
Caption
Small team. High standards. Every project — whether it's a 1,200 sq ft rancher or a 5,000 sq ft custom build in West Vancouver — gets the same level of care. That's not marketing copy. That's just how we work. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#LocalRoofer #BCContractor #VancouverSmallBusiness #StonnexGroup #RoofingWithPride #LowerMainlandBC #CommunityFirst #BuildingBC #HomeIsEverything
Design & Grid Note Build in Canva: cream background, large Playfair Display quote centred, Stonnex Group in small caps below. No photo. No logo graphic. Just the words. This post earns follows from people who appreciate authenticity. Expect saves and profile visits — not just likes.
16
Monday · March
Project Photo
Post at 12:00 PM
Second aerial drone shot. Closes Week 2 with the same premium visual standard that opened Week 1.
Caption
Two materials. One roof. This Lower Mainland residence blends standing seam metal and architectural shingles — a custom approach for a complex roofline. The result is a system built to perform and designed to last. Complex geometry. Clean execution. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC
Hashtags
#LuxuryRoofing #CustomHome #RoofArchitecture #StonnexGroup #LowerMainlandBC #AerialRoofing #MetalAndShingle #PremiumRoofing #VancouverLuxury #RoofDesign
Design & Grid Note Light blue-aerial tones echo Post 2 — this deliberate bookending of aerial shots across the two weeks gives the grid a curated feel. Crop square to frame the rooflines prominently. Post at noon Monday when engagement is consistently strong.
17
Tuesday · March
Lifestyle Photo
Post at 10:00 AM
A lifestyle angle — the roof and the life underneath it. This one earns follows from people not even thinking about a roof.
Caption
The roof you don't think about is the one that's doing its job right. This North Vancouver installation sits above a rooftop terrace — clean architectural shingles, proper drainage, and a view worth protecting. That's the goal every time. 📍 North Vancouver, BC
Hashtags
#NorthVancouver #RooftopLiving #ShingleRoof #VancouverHomes #StonnexGroup #OutdoorLiving #NorthVancouverBC #LuxuryHome #RoofingDoneRight #HomePride
Design & Grid Note Green-sage tones from the North Van hillside give this post a fresh, natural warmth that's unlike everything else in the grid. Short caption is intentional — let the image carry the lifestyle feel. Most likely post to be shared by non-roofing followers.
18
Wednesday · March
Call to Action
Post at 11:00 AM
Spring 2026
Roofing Season
Is Here.
stonnex.com · calvin@stonnex.com
Now Booking
Two weeks in. You've earned the ask. Close with a direct, non-pushy booking CTA.
Caption
Spring roofing season is here. We're booking across the Lower Mainland. If you've been thinking about an inspection, a full replacement, or adding skylights — now is the time to get on the calendar before the busy season fills up. No hard pitch. Just good work, on time, done right. 📍 Lower Mainland, BC 🌐 stonnex.com 📧 calvin@stonnex.com
Hashtags
#StonnexGroup #VancouverRoofing #LowerMainlandBC #BookNow #SpringRoofing #RoofingBC #FreeInspection #LowerMainlandContractor #BCRoofing #RoofReplacement
Design & Grid Note Navy background, cream serif text, gold divider, 'Now Booking' badge. Mirrors the brand intro from Day 1 — bookending the two weeks with identity. After this post, continue the rhythm: project, project, text tile. The pattern is set.
